attack_mechanism: Adversary creates multiple fake identities to gain voting weight
aiba_ehr_defence: Risk score rho_n by TCN+AM; high-risk nodes receive voting weight <=0.3

attack_mechanism: Subset of nodes coordinate to approve malicious blocks
aiba_ehr_defence: Threshold tau_w=0.67 requires broad honest majority; PPO adjusts difficulty under suspicious congestion
observed_impact: Collusion success rate <1.2% for coalitions <= f nodes

attack_mechanism: Adversary replays old valid transactions to double-spend
aiba_ehr_defence: SHA-256 hash chaining; timestamped transactions; duplicate detection in mempool
observed_impact: Zero successful replay attacks in 120,000-event simulation
